meaning: n.桑给巴尔岛(坦桑尼亚东北部)桑给巴尔(非洲坦桑尼亚的一部分)
examples: Tanzania is a union of the states of Tanganyika and Zanzibar.
Zanzibar was recently attacked by a coyote on the Sanitas Valley Trail.
When the British's demands were not met, they opened fired on the far weaker Zanzibar.
The Institute of Marine Sciences (IMS), University of Dar es Salaam, is located on the island of Zanzibar.
In 1964, Tanganyika, Zanzibar and Pemba joined to form the United Republic of Tanganyika and Zanzibar.
